## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation fix (typo, broken link, clarity)
- [ ] Content update (product info, links, roadmap)
- [ ] Translation improvement
- [ ] New file addition

## Checklist

- [ ] Both English and Chinese versions updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Links verified and working
- [ ] Content is factually accurate
- [ ] Follows existing formatting conventions
